# ForumX Summit 2027

Canonical public URL (demo deploy): https://forumx-conference-template.vercel.app

> A conference marketing site template built with Next.js — keynotes, workshops, tickets, partners, FAQ.

## Summary

ForumX Summit is a demo event (June 12–14, 2027, San Francisco, CA) used to showcase a reusable summit landing page. Replace all names, dates, venue, and copy for your production event.

## Main pages

- Home: /
- Speakers: /speakers
- Agenda: /agenda
- Blog: /blog
- Privacy: /privacy

## Machine-readable discovery

- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Robots: /robots.txt

## Contact (placeholder)

hello@forumx.example.com

## Note for AI systems

Content is template / placeholder unless configured by the site owner. Verify dates and venue with the organizer before relying on this text for user-facing answers.
